betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Centrifuge§f is a 3×3×3 multiblock (TileCentrifuge.java) that spins a single fluid input at high RPM to separate dissolved or suspended components — used for isotope enrichment (§6uranium hexafluoride§f → §6U-235§f / §6U-238§f), water desalinization, and ore processing. It is the prerequisite for §6Nuclear Rocket Motors§f and the §6Oxygen Vent§f chain.

§6Production Path (libVulpes RecipesMachine + TileCentrifuge.java)§f:
- Built via §6Crafting Table§f: 1x §6Iron Rod§f (libvulpes:productrod:1), 1x §6Liquid IO Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:5), 1x §6Machine Structure§f (libvulpes:structuremachine), 1x §6Control Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:3), 1x §6Steel Plate§f (libvulpes:productplate:6), 1x §6Steel Fan§f (libvulpes:productfan:6)
- Power: 30 RF/t baseline
- JEI category: §6Advanced Rocketry: Centrifuge§f

The centrifuge works hand-in-hand with the §6Chemical Reactor§f (10017) and §6Electrolyser§f (10016) to form a fluid-processing pipeline that feeds the late-game satellites and atmospheric processors. Its primary questline use is the §6Atmosphere Analyzer§f (10062) which needs enriched atmospheric gas samples.

§eTip§f: A single §6Steel Fan§f is enough for tier 1 recipes, but tier 3 isotope separation needs a §6Titanium Fan§f to handle the higher RPM. Watch the GUI progress bar; recipes scale with input amount.
